name: Cheddar Butter
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Shredded Cheddar Cheese, at room temperature (3 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor fitted with a metal blade, combine all ingredients.
2. Scrape the sides of the container often and process until almost smooth. The cheese will retain some texture.
3. Spoon into a small serving dish and cover. Refrigerate.
4. Let stand at room temperature for 20 to 30 minutes before serving.
5. Makes about 3/4 cup.
VARIATION:
Substitute 3/4 cup (3 oz) shredded Swiss cheese or 1/4 cup (1 oz) crumbled Roquefort or Blue cheese for the cheddar cheese. Add 1 teaspoon crumbled dried herbs.
